messages.content: Hi, book a routine cleaning appointment next week.
Sure! Could you please provide me with your preferred day and time next week for the routine cleaning appointment? Also, may I have your full name?
My name is Alex Rivers, and I am available anytime next Tuesday, October 15th, preferably in the morning.
Thank you, Alex. I have you down for a routine cleaning appointment on Tuesday, October 15th in the morning. We have openings at 9:00 AM and 10:30 AM. Which time works best for you?
9:00 AM works perfectly for me, thanks.

Great! I’ve scheduled your routine cleaning appointment for Tuesday, October 15th at 9:00 AM. If you have any questions or need to reschedule, feel free to reach out. We look forward to seeing you then!

score.reasoning: The assistant efficiently managed the booking process but failed to collect the required contact information before concluding the call.
